productDisplayName: Nike Women Athletes Rowena Blue Handbag
description: Style Note Leave behind your cares of wondering how to carry your vacation shopping back home with this foldable travel bag from nike. Roll it up into a small ball when not in use and open it for a copious space. Product Details Made of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenance Has one main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket inside  Graphic print on the front Fabric handles to carry style and ease Comes with a detachable pouch to carry essentials Material and Care 100% polyester  Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash Size  Measurement Height: 39" Width:   33" Depth: 10"
